consensus: CRITICAL: stampede.sh DEFAULT model is claude-haiku-4.5 (banned). No --model/--models guard at launch. bin/stampede.sh:15-16
Metaswarm child Squad Lead/Worker model assignment is instruction-level only — not launcher-enforced. bin/stampede.sh:739-756,883-888
Commander doc (stampede-commander.agent.md:106-168) correctly enforces premium-only child launches and marks violations partial
tests/depth-guard-lint.sh does NOT check banned model names or banned-model partial behavior — CI gap. tests/depth-guard-lint.sh:35-61
README.md and AGENTS.md are silent on premium pool and banned list — contradicts runtime enforcement. README.md:115,130; AGENTS.md:27
No-silent-downgrade policy is explicitly documented in SKILL.md:407 and README.md:130 — positive signal
User --model override propagates to top-level commander panes but is silently dropped for metaswarm child Squad Leads/Workers. bin/stampede.sh:899-915
conflicts: wkr-007-001 (model-rotation) and wkr-007-004 (child-override-propagation) agree: top-level round-robin works; child propagation does not
wkr-007-005 confidence lower (0.85) due to SKILL.md fallback language ambiguity at line 129 — minor discrepancy vs other workers

wkr-007-001.critical: Default model is banned (claude-haiku-4.5). No banned-model gate in launcher.

wkr-007-002.critical: Commander doc enforces bans correctly; depth-guard-lint.sh does NOT test banned model enforcement.

wkr-007-003.critical: README/AGENTS.md silent on premium pool and banned list; README shows haiku as default, contradicting metaswarm runtime ban.

wkr-007-004.critical: User --model override silently dropped for metaswarm children; only top-level panes honor the flag.

wkr-007-005.critical: No-downgrade policy well-documented; API-level model unavailability and retry behavior not specified.

top_risks.description: Default model claude-haiku-4.5 is banned for metaswarm children; no validation gate prevents its use
User --model/--models override silently dropped for metaswarm child Squad Leads/Workers
CI test (depth-guard-lint.sh) does not verify banned model names or partial/failed on violation
README.md and AGENTS.md document no premium pool or banned list — user-facing documentation gap
No documented behavior for API-level model unavailability (rate limits, outages)
